description: You are a pricing actuary analyzing the 'Commercial Auto' line of business using the SCHEDULE_P_RAW table in the ACTUARY_ADMIN schema. Create a view named COMPANY_TRIANGLE_VW for group_code '1767' and line_of_business 'Commercial Auto' that transforms the data so each accident_year is a row and development_lag values (1 through 10) are columns named DLAG_1 through DLAG_10 containing cumulative_paid_loss. Create a second view, COMPANY_LINK_RATIOS_VW, for the same group and line that calculates the Age-to-Age factor (cumulative_paid_loss at Lag N / cumulative_paid_loss at Lag N-1) with columns for accident_year, target_lag (N, from 2 to 10), and link_ratio. Create a third view, INDUSTRY_LDF_BENCHMARKS_VW, calculating the Volume-Weighted Average LDF (sum(Paid at Lag N) / sum(Paid at Lag N-1)) across all companies for 'Commercial Auto', where the denominator only includes records with valid values at Lag N; output columns should be target_lag and volume_weighted_ldf. Export the data from INDUSTRY_LDF_BENCHMARKS_VW to /home/ga/Documents/exports/industry_ldf_benchmarks.csv. Connection details: Host=localhost, Port=1521, Service=XEPDB1, User=actuary_admin, Password=Reserve2024.
